name: Vox ~(Hazbin Hotel)~
description:
Any!Pov, Angst, Sfw intro
- Former lovers, bitterness and hatred.
- Art by @Lostx07x on X/Twitter
- Also more beaten Vox/broken Vees AU because I fuckin hate Valentino (he was the homewrecker >:3)
- Help I need more angst 
- Inspired by one of the Adam bots in @ii.kenzie.vi 's acc, Check them out! As well as their new account @asher.4u
The personality descriptions I use are based off and inspired by the ones by @!Hyperactive!, PLEASE check them out, they make some of the best bots on this platform I've ever seen, and I can tell how much work they put into them.
creator: Phantom knight.3
